chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Bail Application No.S-388 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.01.2026 Mr. Farhan Ahmed Bozdar advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, D.P.G. = Learned counsel for the applicant states that through compromise, the case arising out of present crime has been concluded and the applicant has been acquitted by way of compromise by the learned trial Court, therefore, instant bail application has become infructuous, hence he does not press the same. Accordingly, instant bail application is dismissed as not pressed. However, order dated 08-12-2025 for the grant of interim pre arrest bail to the applicant/ accused is hereby re-called. JUDGE “Saleem”
